## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests pass
- [ ] Lint/build checks pass
- [ ] Non-obvious workflow, concurrency, fallback, or business-rule changes include updated explanatory comments in the same diff.

## Design System Drift Check (Required for UI/Layout changes)

- [ ] I referenced `/docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md` sections used by this change.
- [ ] I used existing layout/spacing tokens (no ad-hoc top-level geometry values).
- [ ] I validated at 390px and at least one desktop width (1440px or 1920px).
- [ ] I checked RTL alignment/spacing on impacted surfaces.
- [ ] I attached before/after screenshots for layout-sensitive updates.
